title: Unit & Measurement Symbols: Copy & Paste Ω µ Å ℧ Scientific Units
meta_description: Copy and paste scientific unit and measurement symbols — ohm (Ω), micro (µ), angstrom (Å), mho (℧), metric squares, and per-mille marks. Click to copy instantly.
hero_tagline: Ohm, micro, angstrom, and the full set of scientific unit glyphs for physics, chemistry, and engineering. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Scientific and engineering writing relies on dedicated Unicode unit symbols that ordinary keyboards do not provide. This library gathers the electrical and physics signs such as the ohm (Ω), micro (µ), mho (℧), and angstrom (Å); the pre-composed metric squares from the CJK Compatibility block like ㎏ and ㎜; and the temperature and ratio marks used for measurements. Click any character to copy it for lab reports, datasheets, or technical posts.

sections.label: Physics
sections.intro: Dedicated single-character signs for resistance, conductance, and atomic-scale measurement.

sections.label: Metric Squares
sections.intro: Pre-composed metric units from the CJK Compatibility block that fit a single character cell.

sections.label: Temperature & Ratio
sections.intro: Temperature-scale signs and the prime and ratio characters used in measurement notation.

related.title: Math Symbols
related.desc: Mathematical operators, Greek letters, roots, and infinity signs.

related.desc: The degree sign with temperature, angle, and prime characters.
